title: cleisostoma draco
intro: Cleisostoma draco, also known as the dragon Cleisostoma or dragon orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Cleisostoma draco is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Cleisostoma draco are typically made by drying the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots, and then using them to create teas, infusions, or tinctures.
